name: Applesauce Bar Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Prepare the bottom of an 11 x 7-inch pan with vegetable cooking spray.
3. Sift together flour, baking soda, spices (cinnamon, allspice, cloves), and salt.
4. Cream together margarine and sugar until light and fluffy.
5. Add egg to the margarine mixture and beat until combined.
6. Alternately add the dry ingredients and applesauce, stirring just enough to blend well.
7. Add raisins.
8. Turn batter into the prepared pan.
9. Bake for about 30 minutes.
10. Let cool for 10 minutes before cutting into 24 squares.
- Serving size: 1 cookie = 1 bread exchange plus 1/2 fat exchange.
- Nutritional information: CHO 15, PRO 1, FAT 2, CAL 80, Na 98
